description: Search Elastic and OpenTelemetry blog posts and tutorials for announcements, deep dives, and practical guides. Use when the user asks about recent developments, use cases, or step-by-step tutorials.

configuration.query: FROM edot-kb-docs METADATA _score | WHERE content_type == "blog" AND MATCH(body_semantic, ?query) | KEEP title, body, url, tags, source_tier, last_crawled, _score | SORT _score DESC | LIMIT 5

query.description: The user's search query for blog posts or tutorials
